---
name: Skill suggestion
about: Propose a new playbook or an improvement to a skill
title: "[skill] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The job to be done

What commercial task should this help with.

## Which skill

An addition to one of the existing skills (marketing, prospecting, selling) or a case for a new skill.

## Trigger phrases

What a user would say to invoke it (French or English).

## Notes

Frameworks or sources, if any. Keep it concept-level and safe (no platform-terms-violating scraping, no stealth send automation).
